title: Tao Te Ching 69
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 69 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 69 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: There is a saying among soldiers: I dare not be the host but prefer to be the guest. I dare not advance an inch but prefer to retreat a foot.
